---
title: R-only fixture (no Python — CDN must NOT be injected)
filters: [../_extensions/blendtutor/blendtutor.lua]
---

## R-only exercises (no Python)

### Exercise 1: R exercise

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Write a function `add(a, b)` that returns the sum.

```r
add <- function(a, b) { ___ }
```

```{.r .checks}
stopifnot(add(1, 2) == 3)
```
:::

### Exercise 2: Another R exercise

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Set `x` to 10.

```r
x <- 10
```

```{.r .checks}
stopifnot(x == 10)
```
:::
